data.title: EV company's stock rises, then falls due to $1B Bitcoin, Ethereum, and BNB plan by Jiuzi Holdings, drawing mixed reactions.
data.description: Jiuzi Holdings recently revealed their intention to launch a crypto treasury worth $1 billion, with a primary focus on Bitcoin, Ethereum, and BNB. This news has received a varied response from investors, with some showing enthusiasm while others remain cautious.

data.title: MNA nurses and healthcare professionals, along with a Boston University Public Health Professor, to testify on legislation to prevent closures of essential healthcare services due to more than 40 closures since 2009.
data.description: Proposed legislation by members of the MNA aims to maintain crucial healthcare access following the closure of over 40 hospitals and services since 2009. Despite the Department of Public Health recognizing these facilities as vital for community well-being, closures persist. Scheduled for discussion in Boston on Sept. 24, 2025, these bills seek to address the ongoing healthcare crisis and ensure continued access to essential services for the affected communities.

data.title: Subsea 7 S.A. discloses share awards under 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan approved by Board on September 24, 2025.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Luxembourg, Subsea 7 S.A. (Oslo Børs: SUBC, ADR: SUBCY) disclosed the award specifics of its 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan, sanctioned by the Board.

data.title: Wall Street hits new highs, Oracle sees best rally since 1992. VOO ETF at record levels. Inflation at 2.9%, jobless claims highest since Oct 2021. Labor market weakening.
data.description: This week, Wall Street continued its record-breaking streak fueled by increased investor confidence in Federal Reserve rate cuts and the anticipated growth of AI-driven companies. The VOO ETF has reached all-time high trading levels. Despite concerns about rising inflation and weakening labor market conditions, traders remain optimistic about the prospects of further interest rate reductions. August saw an uptick in annual inflation, reaching 2.9%, the highest level seen since January. Conversely, jobless claims surged to 263,000 in the first week of September, marking the highest weekly figure recorded since October 2021. Following a stagnant August payrolls report, indications suggest a slowdown in the labor market's momentum. The financial markets are...Full details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fuji Electric launches new FRENIC-MEGA (G2) AC Drive featuring expanded capabilities for versatility and performance.
data.description: Fuji Electric Corp. of America has unveiled the latest FRENIC-MEGA (G2) AC drive, an enhanced version of the renowned FRENIC series. This iteration boasts upgraded features that elevate its performance, efficiency, and control within general-purpose variable frequency drives. Leveraging the robust foundation of the original FRENIC-MEGA, the (G2) model offers expanded functionalities, marking a new benchmark in adaptability and power. The FRENIC-MEGA (G2) integrates various drive functions, further advancing its capabilities.

data.title: Seeq rated as leader in 2025 Green Quadrant for Industrial AI Analytics by research firm for strengths in data, optimization, machine learning.
data.description: Seeq has been acknowledged as one of the leading industry players by an independent research and advisory firm. The firm highlighted Seeq’s expertise in data contextualization, process optimization, machine learning development, and overall innovation. The recognition underscores Seeq's position as a top company in the industry. The announcement was made in Seattle on September 24, 2025. Seeq is a global leader in industrial solutions and has demonstrated exceptional capabilities in various crucial areas, earning it a place among the top industry leaders.

data.title: PRÆSIDIAD appoints Benjamin Neumann as CEO, effective immediately in 2025. Neumann has extensive international leadership experience.
data.description: In Birmingham, England on September 24, 2025, PRÆSIDIAD, the parent company overseeing Betafence and Hesco, revealed the selection of Benjamin Neumann as the new Chief Executive Officer. Benjamin, assuming the role with immediate effect, boasts a wealth of global leadership expertise in various sectors, including energy.

data.title: Full Swing opens EMEA showroom in Wokingham, UK to reach 20 million golfers, strengthening global presence.
data.description: Full Swing, a leading innovator in sports technology, has expanded its brand presence in the EMEA region by launching a strategic hub in Wokingham, U.K., located west of London. This move aims to enhance visibility among the region's 20 million golfers. The showroom, inaugurated on September 24, 2025, serves as Full Swing's gateway to tap into the lucrative EMEA market and solidify its position as an industry frontrunner.

data.title: Social Security employees facing challenges meeting demand post staffing cuts, leading to long wait times for some.
data.description: Following the reductions in staff this year, certain individuals are experiencing wait times of several hours, while others are able to move through quickly. The burden falls heavily on field office workers who are struggling to manage the workload.

data.title: Asia-Pacific is global leader in crypto adoption; new report states region has fastest growing on-chain activity.
data.description: According to a recent report by Chainalysis, the region experienced the highest growth rate in on-chain activity. The findings were based on transaction data analysis, indicating significant growth in the region's blockchain transactions compared to other regions.

data.title: Myriad introduces revenue sharing program for predictors and builders, offering USDC rewards via personal referral links.
data.description: The forecast platform protocol has introduced revenue sharing, offering USDC rewards to users who share through their unique referral link.

data.title: C3 AI recognized as Leader in Industrial AI by Verdantix, scoring highest in capabilities and momentum. #EnterpriseAI #Verdantix #C3AI
data.description: C3 AI, listed on NYSE as AI, a leading Enterprise AI application software company headquartered in Redwood City, California, has been recognized as a top performer by Verdantix. The company was designated as a Leader in the Green Quadrant: Industrial AI Analytics Software (2025) report. This prestigious accolade was a result of C3 AI securing the highest scores for capabilities and momentum. The evaluation conducted by Verdantix focused on Enterprise AI analytics software providers specializing in predictive maintenance and supply chain solutions. C3 AI's continued excellence in this space has solidified its reputation as a frontrunner in the industry.

data.title: FINRA Board approves 4 rules, amends day trading rules, updates on cybersecurity program and initiatives.
data.description: In Washington, the Board of Governors of FINRA convened on September 17-18. The board approved four rule proposals, along with proposed amendments to FINRA’s pattern day trading rules. Updates were provided on the FINRA Forward initiative, the Consolidated Audit Trail, and FINRA’s cybersecurity program during the meeting. The Board discussed the progress of the FINRA Forward initiatives aimed at enhancing the organization's operational effectiveness and efficiency. This includes ongoing efforts to improve the regulatory framework and address key issues impacting the financial industry.

data.title: Global market for high-end cloud AI accelerators is changing in 2026 due to ASICs, packaging, and HBM.
data.description: In Taipei on September 24, 2025, it was reported that the high-end cloud AI accelerator market is on the brink of a significant shift. Predictions from DIGITIMES suggest that by 2026, the industry will transition to a decentralized phase influenced by three main factors. This shift is expected to reshape the supply chain dynamics in the market. The forecast indicates that custom ASICs will play a key role in driving this evolution.

data.title: Subaru of America reveals pricing for 2026 Subaru BRZ models, including new Series.Yellow edition and discontinuation of BRZ Premium level.
data.description: The recently unveiled 2026 Subaru BRZ Series.Yellow showcases a stunning "Sunrise Yellow" exterior coupled with sleek matte black wheel finishes. The BRZ Limited and BRZ tS versions are priced the same as the previous models. The vehicle is powered by a powerful 2.4-liter SUBARU BOXER engine for enhanced performance. However, the BRZ Premium level has been discontinued in this latest model. This news was announced from CAMDEN, N.J. on September 24, 2025.

data.title: LexisNexis Risk Solutions provides U.S. property insurers with a dashboard for market insights and better decision-making.
data.description: A recently launched dashboard is designed to aid property insurers in the U.S. by providing assistance in navigating market changes, comparing claims performance, speeding up decision-making processes, and managing the challenge of increasing claim severities. This tool is intended to offer insurers enhanced confidence in their actions. Introduced in Atlanta on September 24, 2025, by LexisNexis® Risk Solutions, a prominent provider of data and analytics services.

data.title: Balavant Insurance Group promotes Tracy Bernard to Chief Program Officer and Krissy Kyjovsky to Executive Vice President of Tangram.
data.description: Novato, California - Balavant Insurance Group, on September 24, 2025, disclosed the promotion of two top executives, showcasing the firm's commitment to talent and expansion. Tracy Bernard has been appointed as the Chief Program Officer of Balavant, where she will oversee product development initiatives.

data.title: 84 Lumber highlights building efficiency at HUD's event with SBCA, emphasizing innovative housing solutions.
data.description: In EIGHTY FOUR, Pennsylvania, on September 24, 2025, the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) organized the Innovative Housing Showcase. The event saw 84 Lumber collaborating with the Structural Building Components Association (SBCA).

data.title: Report on South Africa coal mining industry with profiles of 22 companies added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. Covers reserves, production, prices, exports, rail issues, and environmental concerns.
data.description: A report titled "Coal Mining Industry in South Africa 2025" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report sheds light on various aspects of the coal mining sector in South Africa, encompassing coal testing labs. It covers details on reserves, production rates, pricing trends, and export data. Additionally, it highlights key players in the industry and their corporate activities. The report delves into challenges related to rail connectivity and infrastructure that have significantly impacted the sector, as well as environmental concerns, mine safety protocols, and market competition.

data.title: #FundMUN Coalition hosting election forum for university funding in St. John's tonight, ahead of provincial election.
data.description: Tonight in St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, the Memorial University Newfoundland (MUN) Coalition of Unions is organizing a public townhall ahead of next month’s provincial election. This event aims to address concerns regarding support for the province’s sole public university and will involve all three major political parties. A panel discussion will include representatives from each party, including the Minister for Education and Early Childhood Development and nominees from the New Democratic Party. The discussion will provide a platform for the public to raise questions and engage with key figures from the political spectrum.
